description_long: This is a classic rectangular briefcase with a hard, black exterior and reinforced metallic corners, giving it a vintage and durable appearance. The surface of the case is adorned with several colorful travel stickers, suggesting it has been used for travel or business trips. The briefcase features a sturdy, dark brown leather handle attached to the front with metal brackets, and two visible metal latches for secure closure. The interior is lined with a light, textured fabric, providing a soft compartment for carrying documents or personal items. The case opens on a hinge, with the lid able to rest fully open, revealing the spacious main compartment. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban professionals or travelers.
description: A vintage-style black hard briefcase with metallic corner reinforcements, travel stickers, a leather handle, and a fabric-lined interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the briefcase both closed and open, highlighting the handle, latches, and interior lining.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, displaying the depth of the main compartment and the placement of travel stickers on the exterior.
description_view_2: Rear and side view showing the back and the open lid, with metallic corner reinforcements and the briefcase's rectangular profile.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the open interior space and the arrangement of stickers on the closed half.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed handle, rectangular in shape, made of dark brown leather, attached with metal brackets to the front side.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal latches on the front edge, standard clasp type, no visible combination or key lock.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Metallic corner protectors on all eight corners, rounded and covering the edges for durability.
